category_sources: source_facts.description says osm-pbf provides tools related to PBF, an alternative to XML; official OpenStreetMap Wiki describes PBF as Protocolbuffer Binary Format for OpenStreetMap data.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and current_curation.display-name both provide osm-pbf; official OSM-binary repository README uses OSMPBF naming for the project.
docs_sources: Official OpenStreetMap Wiki documents the PBF format and links the OSM-binary code; official OSM-binary README says it is a Java/C++ library to read and write OpenStreetMap PBF files.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/openstreetmap/OSM-binary; per instruction repo was not redetermined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions PBF and XML; official OpenStreetMap Wiki and OSM-binary README describe PBF as a binary OpenStreetMap data format using Protocol Buffers.
